title: On May 26, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited by CNPC Northeast Company to visit Liaoning Plastics Industrial Park
contentHtml: On May 26, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited by CNPC Northeast Company to come to Chaoyang City, Liaoning Province with Mr. Shi to visit the Plastics Industrial Park. Liaison with local governments and exploring cooperation models have been highly praised by local governments and enterprises.
titleZh: 5月26日，天晖集团董事长曾胜文受中油东北公司邀请走访辽宁塑料产业园
contentHtmlZh: 5月26号，天晖集团董事长曾胜文受中油东北公司邀请，和石总一起来到辽宁省朝阳市，走访塑料产业园。对接地方政府，探讨合作模式，得到当地政府和企业的高度好评。
